scripts.release:copy-apis: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src=path.resolve(__dirname,'..','API'); const out=path.resolve(__dirname,'release','api'); fs.mkdirSync(out,{recursive:true}); for (const f of ['coredaq_js_api.js','coredaq_python_api.py','README.md']) { const from=path.join(src,f); const to=path.join(out,f); if (fs.existsSync(from)) fs.copyFileSync(from,to); } console.log('[coreConsole] copied APIs to '+out);"
scripts.dist: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder && npm run release:copy-apis
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --mac && npm run release:copy-apis
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win && npm run release:copy-apis
scripts.dist:win:portable: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win portable --x64 && npm run release:copy-apis
scripts.dist:win:portable:fast: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win portable --x64 -c.compression=store && npm run release:copy-apis
scripts.dist:win:zip: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win dir --x64 && npm run release:copy-apis && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$v=(Get-Content package.json | ConvertFrom-Json).version; $zip=\"release/coreConsole-$v-win-unpacked.zip\"; if(Test-Path $zip){Remove-Item $zip -Force}; Compress-Archive -Path \"release/win-unpacked/*\" -DestinationPath $zip -Force; Write-Host \"Created $zip\""
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --linux && npm run release:copy-apis
scripts.release:all: npm run build:renderer && npx electron-builder --mac && npx electron-builder --win --x64 && npm run release:organize
